creator: tate@tateoka.org
text:
Local startup scripts in /usr/local/etc/rc.d/ are invoked twice.
	Because default variable of local_startup is 
        "/usr/local/etc/rc.d /usr/X11R6/etc/rc.d", and
	UPDATE instruction describs to make symlink from X11R6 to local.

Fix: 

set local_startup variable to "/usr/local/etc/rc.d" in /etc/rc.conf
	or /etc/defaults/rc.conf.
	Describe this problem to ports/UPDATE is first fix, I think.
How-To-Repeat: 	reboot the machine after updated to xorg 7.2.
